case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF VS. JOSE A. ANGUIANO HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ANGUIANO HERNANDEZ, JOSE A.
